headline: Is Beyond Meat’s (BYND) New Spicy Buffalo Range Subtly Reframing Its Core Brand Narrative?
summary: In April 2026, Beyond Meat, Inc. expanded its plant-based chicken range with a new Spicy Buffalo Beyond Chicken Pieces variety, rolling it out nationwide across more than 2,000 Kroger stores as a convenient, Non-GMO and Clean Label Project-certified frozen option. This launch highlights Beyond Meat’s push to broaden its portfolio beyond burgers and sausages by offering higher-protein, clean-label products that can slot easily into everyday meals.
